case_title: SVIATLANA SIARHEYEVA VS. CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS INC DBA CITIBANK

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,392.40 FILED BY SIARHEYEVA, SVIATLANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS INC DBA CITIBANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIARHEYEVA, SVIATLANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS INC DBA CITIBANK

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (**SEE SIGNATURE SECTION** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED OCT-21-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS INC DBA CITIBANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
